allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; json.load\(open\('Notebooks/deep_learning.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('Notebook JSON: VALID'\)")
PowerShell(try { Get-Content -Raw 'Notebooks/deep_learning.ipynb' | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; "Notebook JSON: VALID" } catch { "INVALID: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $nb = Get-Content -Raw 'Notebooks/deep_learning.ipynb' | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction Stop; "Notebook JSON: VALID \($\($nb.cells.Count\) cells\)" } catch { "INVALID: $_" })
